cases.notes: Vendored Noto Naskh Arabic shapes contextual joining forms and diverges from raw cmap glyph IDs without promoting full Arabic support.
Vendored Noto Naskh Arabic proves a bounded base-plus-mark case with positioned or zero-advance mark clusters only.
Single-run shaping keeps paragraph-owned bidi ordering explicit instead of silently approximating mixed Arabic/LTR layout.

remainingGates.detail: Vendored Noto Naskh Arabic does not yet supply a ticket-ready positive lam-alef shaping proof in Kanvas runtime evidence; keep this case explicit until a reviewed Arabic fixture or implementation proof lands.
Positive cursive-attachment evidence is still proven only on the bounded reviewed M6-005 fixture family, not yet on the vendored Noto Arabic ticket-local fixture wave.
Dedicated arabic-missing-cursive/arabic-missing-mark fixtures and narrower text.shaping.arabic-* refusal codes remain absent; generic gdef/mark/cursive diagnostics stay separate evidence for now.
